summary: Replace persistent hand-grid feedback with a minimal pinch point and vertical swipe scrolling feedback on the webpage.
scope: draw a plain translucent green point only while pinching
render central outline arrows for horizontal swipe results
map left swipe to scroll-up and right swipe to scroll-down
remove the controller action panel and synthetic arrow-key navigation
notes: The right swipe and upward pinch drag both move the reading view toward lower page content.
